name: Walford Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Place celery, grapes, apple, dates, and walnuts in a bowl.
2. In a separate container, combine mayonnaise with white wine.
3. Pour the dressing over the salad ingredients.
4. Stir to ensure all components are well combined.
5. Use a slotted spoon to serve, gently shaking to remove excess dressing.
6. Serve on lettuce leaves.
